`ate-out/T2-files.txt` written with 4 file paths:

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `backend/src/main/java/com/tepeu/agent/tool/SmsTools.java` | **Create** — `@Component` with `@Tool`-annotated `send_sms` method |
| `backend/src/test/java/com/tepeu/agent/tool/SmsToolsTest.java` | **Create** — tests for tool registration & behavior |
| `backend/src/main/java/com/tepeu/agent/Tools.java` | **Modify** — add `SmsTools` parameter and one `registry.register(...)` line |
| `backend/src/test/java/com/tepeu/service/chat/ChatServiceTest.java` | **Modify** — register `smsTools` in test `setUp()` to match pattern |

**Files that explicitly do NOT need changes:** `ChatService.java` (reads registry generically), `ToolRegistry.java` (no tool-specific logic), `AgentOrchestrator.java` (only injects tools needing workspace binding — SMS is external-API-only).

**Key pattern:** Spring AI's `ToolCallbacks.from(Object...)` discovers `@Tool`-annotated methods by reflection at runtime, so the only registration step is one `registry.register("smsTools", smsTools)` call in `Tools.java`.
